summary_text: AI-Lab recorded resolved provider latest-context policy metadata in saved provider comparison artifacts. scripts/compare_providers.py now writes context_require_admission, context_max_warning_admissions, and context_max_warning_admissions_source alongside context_policy when --latest-context is used. The metadata is derived from provider_latest_context_policy, so saved comparison artifacts now show whether warning-admission caps came from an explicit CLI value, the provider default, or unset policy. Tests cover provider default metadata and explicit zero-cap metadata. Full test suite passed with 201 tests.
